---
name: Pull Request
about: Submit changes for review
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

# Pull Request

## Description

Provide a concise summary of the changes and the problem it solves.  
Reference the issue number if applicable:

Fixes # (issue number)

### Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change)
- [ ] Breaking change (requires documentation update)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / Code improvement
- [ ] CI/CD / DevOps / Build change

### Related Issues / Dependencies

List any related issues or PRs and any dependencies.

---

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project style guidelines (ESLint, Prettier, Perfectionist)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have added or updated tests to verify my changes (unit/integration)
- [ ] I have run all tests locally and they pass
- [ ] I have added necessary documentation (README, comments, API docs)
- [ ] I have updated TypeScript types if applicable
- [ ] I have added any required environment variables / configuration updates

---

## Screenshots / Demo (if applicable)

Include screenshots, GIFs, or links to live demo to illustrate changes.

---

## Additional Notes

Add any other context or comments relevant to reviewers or maintainers.
